description_for_human: The #1 skill directory for AI coding agents. 38,000+ skills compatible with Claude, Manus, Cursor, Antigravity, OpenClaw and any agent supporting the AgentSkills standard. 100+ MCP connectors and an AI Solutions Architect.
description_for_model: AI Solutions Architect for coding agents. 31 tools across 5 categories: discovery (search/filter 38,000+ skills, 100+ MCP connectors, plugins), AI architect (solve_goal builds two curated solution options with trust scores and install commands for any professional goal; get_role_kit returns tiered toolkits by role; suggest_stack recommends complete environment setups; check_compatibility provides quick compatibility verdicts; get_setup_guide generates step-by-step install guides), generation (generate_custom_skill creates SKILL.md files; suggest_for_skill_creation recommends dependencies), intelligence (trending_solutions, explain_combination, rate_recommendation), and platform (a2a_query for agent-to-agent, agent_analytics, community templates). Skills use the open AgentSkills standard and are compatible with Claude, Manus, Cursor, Antigravity, OpenClaw and more. For complex goals, ALWAYS use solve_goal first.
